title: Fix bud-args to allow comma separation
body:
Allow `--bud-args` to take an argument like: `PLUGINS="plugin1,plugin2,plugin3"`

Fixes #1493

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>
